article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.6. Attachment 1 - Provincial Housing Target Order 2026-04-14.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: BC Province Orders Burnaby to Build 10,240 New Homes by 2030
briefs.summary: The BC Minister of Housing has issued a Housing Target Order requiring Burnaby to complete at least 10,240 net new housing units between September 1, 2025 and August 31, 2030. Council is set to review this order, which sets yearly building milestones and requires regular progress reports to the Province.
briefs.action_required: Watch for how Burnaby responds — zoning and development rules may change to meet these targets.

key_dates.label: BC Provincial Housing Target Order for Burnaby takes effect
Burnaby Housing Target Order — Reporting Period 1.1 ends

Burnaby Housing Target Order — Year 3 progress report deadline
